column1: 彼は毎日三時間も勉強しています。
column2: かれはまいにちさんじかんもべんきょうしています。
column3: He studies as many as three hours every day.
column4: Number + も (as many as; even; emphasis)
column6: N + も: as many as N — surprisingly large amount; emphatic quantity
column7: three hours is an impressive amount
column8: Nも = surprising amount; Nだけ = only N; Nしかない = no more than N
